small.description: Minor-audit path for work inside the applicable language budget.

large.description: Full feature or bug path for work outside small-path budget.

preparation.description: Epic-child preparation path: promotion, research, feature documents, atomic planning, and preflight clearance only. Atomic execution, PR authoring, CI monitoring, and feature review are out of scope and are executed later by epic-orchestrator.

epic.description: Epic path for scheduling a dependency graph of child features across parallel worktrees with fan-in via a shared integration branch.

model_policy.description: Judgment-based complexity-band model selection. This block governs only the delegation model tier. It is not a route input, and route is not an input to model selection.

complexity.scale: C1 trivial or mechanical change with no behavior effect. C2 localized feature or bug change confined to a small surface. C3 cross-cutting change that alters an invariant, contract, or behavior across module boundaries. C4 novel, ambiguous, or research-heavy change requiring the most capable tier; C4 is reached only by judgment and is never floor-forced.

signals.name: classifier_or_model_logic
signals.anchor: Changes to classifier engines, scoring, or model-affecting logic (T1 modules).

signals.name: auth_or_token_handling
signals.anchor: Changes to authentication, token handling, or other security-sensitive paths.

signals.name: concurrency_or_ordering
signals.anchor: Introduces or modifies concurrency, ordering, or state-transition invariants.

signals.name: cross_module_contract_change
signals.anchor: Alters a public contract or schema consumed across module boundaries.

signals.name: single_file_localized_edit
signals.anchor: A localized edit confined to one file with no cross-cutting effect.

signals.name: mechanical_rename_or_move
signals.anchor: A mechanical rename, move, or formatting change with no behavior change.

preferred_overlay.description: Applied only under fable_policy preferred. Changes only the C3 cell to fable, and only for the listed agents. No other agent and no other band is affected.

model_budget.description: Session-level model budget. fable_policy is a three-way switch controlling whether the fable tier is disabled (removed and clamped to opus), available (used as-is), or preferred (applies the preferred_overlay).
